title: goodenia corralina
intro: Goodenia corralina, also known as corralina or goodenia, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune system function. Goodenia corralina can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
